hero_sub: Repairs, maintenance, and installations for roofs in the North West
about: K.H. Roofing Contractors is a family-run business serving the North West with roofing services including repairs, maintenance, and installations. We offer flat roof installation, slating, tiling, roof replacement, and fascia/guttering services

faq.q: What areas do K.H. Roofing Contractors cover?
faq.a: K.H. Roofing serves the North West, with a base in Manchester

faq.q: How can I book a roofing service with K.H. Roofing?
faq.a: To book, you can call 0161 825 7408 or email Enquiries@khroofs.co.uk

faq.q: What services can I expect from K.H. Roofing Contractors?
faq.a: K.H. Roofing offers repairs, maintenance, flat roof installation, slating, tiling, roof replacement, and fascia/guttering services
